zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Delves於1325年出生在英國爾多丁頓時，他的父親Sir Richard de Delves30歲，母親Amicia26歲。他於1349年與Katherine Arderne在英國英格蘭爾多丁頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年7月31日在英國斯塔福爾貝特利享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Delves于1325年出生在英国爾多丁頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard de Delves30岁，母亲Amicia26岁。他于1349年与Katherine Arderne在英国英格兰爾多丁頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年7月31日在英国斯塔福爾貝特利享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Delves was born in 1325, in Doddington, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Richard de Delves, was 30 and his mother, Amicia, was 26. He married Katherine Arderne in 1349, in Doddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 31 July 1396, in Betley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Delves est né en 1325, à Doddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Delves, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Amicia, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Arderne en 1349, à Doddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 31 juillet 1396, à Betley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Delves 1325 in Doddington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard de Delves 30 und seine Mutter Amicia 26. Er hat 1349 in Doddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Arderne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 31. Juli 1396 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Betley, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Delves è nato il nel 1325 nel Doddington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard de Delves, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Amicia, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Arderne nel 1349, nel Doddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 luglio 1396, nel Betley, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Delvesが1325年にイギリスチェシュアイアドッドイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Delvesは30歳，母Amiciaは26歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアドッドイントンでKatherine Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年7月31日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアベトリーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Delves(이)가 1325년 영국 체실르 도딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard de Delves(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Amicia(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 도딩턴에서 Katherine Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 7월 31일 영국 스태퍼드실르 베틀리에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Delves nasceu em 1325, em Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Delves, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Amicia, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Arderne em 1349, em Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 31 de julho de 1396, em Betley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Delves родился в 1325 г. в местности доддингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard de Delves было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Amicia, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Arderne в 1349 г. в местности доддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 31 июля 1396 г. в местности бетли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Delves nació en 1325, en Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard de Delves, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Amicia, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Katherine Arderne en 1349, en Doddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de julio de 1396, en Betley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
